items.headline: PSG held by Lorient with fringe team ahead of Bayern Munich return leg
items.description: Paris Saint-Germain warmed up for the second leg of their Champions League semi-final against Bayern Munich by fielding a second-string line-up and throwing away the lead twice in a 2-2 draw...

items.headline: Mercedes' podium streak ends in Miami as McLaren delivers a 1-2 punch
items.description:
MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Mercedes was knocked off the podium for the first time this season when Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri finished 1-2 for McLaren in Formula 1's sprint race Saturday at the Miami Grand Prix.
Charles Leclerc was third for Ferrari in the 19-lap preview of Sunday's race at the Miami International Autodrome around the Hard Rock Stadium.

items.headline: Kostyuk of Ukraine beats Russian opponent Andreeva to win Madrid Open title
items.description:
MADRID (AP) — Marta Kostyuk of Ukraine beat Mirra Andreeva of Russia 7-5, 6-3 to win the Madrid Open title on Saturday.
The two players, whose countries have been at war since Russia’s invasion in 2022, did not shake hands at the net after the match or pose together at the awards ceremony.

items.headline: Hair-pulling trend in Premier League continues as Dan Ballard sent off for Sunderland
items.description:
Red cards for hair-pulling have never been so frequent in the Premier League.
The latest came Saturday when Sunderland defender Dan Ballard was sent off for yanking the hair of Wolverhampton striker Tolu Arokodare as they competed for the ball in the first half of the teams' meeting at Molineux.
